creator: marco.broeder@posteo.eu
text:
On Tue May 25 2010 23:26:24 c-s@c-s.li wrote:
> I fully understand you. Well, this is the usual way it used to be done
> with the ports I saw from launchpad.net. You could try the direct link if
> it resolves:
> 
> http://launchpad.net/dulwich/trunk/0.6.0/+download/dulwich-0.6.0.tar.gz
> 
> Tell me please, if it works.

Unfortunately, it does not. It only works for a direct download with a
human browser, but it redirects to nowhere if fetching occurs within
ports framework. Looks like a countermeasure to prevent automatic
download methods.

I already tried these links now and in the past with no success.

I probably try to contact Jelmer Vernooij later. Perhaps he is kind
enough to also release a distribution tarball at

http://pypi.python.org/pypi/dulwich/

That means two or three additional mirrors ...

-- 
Regards
